channel.title: Recursos on Ubuntu Venezuela
channel.description: Recent content in Recursos on Ubuntu Venezuela

item.title: Certificate Guide for Organizers
item.description: For the Ubuntu Venezuela system to generate certificates in seconds (like for your 3,000 participants), it is vital that your template follows these technical standards. 1. The SVG Format The system only processes .svg files. Make sure the dimensions are standard for printing (A4 or Letter). 2. The Name Field (Critical ID) The Python script searches for a specific text object to inject the participant’s name. In your SVG editor (like Inkscape), select the text where the name will go.
